parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: 'bayflow', activity_type: 'churn_prevention', description: 'Sent ' + $json.riskType + ' email to ' + $json.email, metadata: { risk_type: $json.riskType, user_email: $json.email } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'Churn Prevention: Processed at-risk users. Emails sent for ' + $('Classify Risk Type').all().filter(i => !i.json._empty).length + ' users.', source: 'churn-prevention' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ from: 'BayFlow <noreply@bayflow.com>', to: [$json.email], subject: 'Your BayFlow subscription has been cancelled', text: $json.emailBody }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ business_id: 'bayflow', activity_type: 'cancellation', description: 'User cancelled: ' + $json.email + '. Reason: ' + $json.reason, metadata: { user_email: $json.email, reason: $json.reason } }) }}
